theme: How might TU Delft improve first-year transition and belonging?

turns.speaker: P1
turns.text: We should make the culture more inclusive for everyone.

turns.speaker: P2
turns.text: Yeah, that would help. Maybe some kind of community activity?

turns.speaker: P1
turns.text: Exactly, like networking or something social.

turns.speaker: P2
turns.text: But I'm not sure how to make it actually work in practice.

turns.speaker: P1
turns.text: We could start with a small pilot group, maybe 20 students?

turns.speaker: P2
turns.text: How would we select them and what format would the activities take?
